name: Airwallex Global Payments & Financial Infrastructure API
what_it_does: Airwallex REST API for global payments and financial infrastructure platform. Enables AI agents to manage multi-currency global accounts and wallet operations, handle cross-border payments and FX conversion, access payment collection in local currencies (100+ countries), retrieve global payout to vendors and contractors, manage corporate card issuance and expense management, handle payment link and invoice generation, access FX rate locking and hedging workflows, retrieve financial reporting and reconciliation data, manage subsidiary and multi-entity account structures, and integrate financial infrastructure with marketplaces, SaaS platforms, and enterprise systems via embedded finance.
use_cases: Managing cross-border payments and FX from global treasury automation agents
Handling global vendor payouts from international AP agents
Accessing multi-currency collections from global revenue operations agents
Integrating embedded financial infrastructure from fintech platform agents
not_for: Domestic-only payments without cross-border and multi-currency needs
Consumer payments without business payment infrastructure focus
Non-financial businesses without embedded finance integration
best_when: A global business, marketplace, or platform using Airwallex wants AI agents to automate cross-border payments, FX management, vendor payouts, multi-currency collections, corporate cards, and embedded financial workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: Global payment automation requires AML, KYC, and OFAC compliance for all payees. FX conversion at scale involves currency risk — automated hedging requires financial expertise and controls. Embedded finance integration requires regulatory approval in each jurisdiction. Multi-entity treasury automation must maintain proper entity separation.

auth.notes: Airwallex uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials for API access. Account-level credentials with payments, FX, wallets, and reporting scopes. Comprehensive API documentation. Webhooks for payment and FX events. SDKs for Python, Node.js, Java, PHP, Go, Ruby. Sandbox environment available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No account fees; transaction and FX fees per payment
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go: 0.5-2% FX margin; payment fees by method and country
pricing.notes: Melbourne, Australia. Founded 2015. Global financial infrastructure unicorn. $5.5B+ valuation (2022). Used by SHEIN, Papaya Global, and 100,000+ businesses. 150+ currencies, 200+ countries. Embedded finance for platforms. Banking licenses in EU, UK, and APAC. Competes with Wise, Stripe, and Adyen for global payments.

performance.rate_limits: 100 API requests/second per application; higher limits available

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: AML/KYC/OFAC compliance required for all payees — automated payment to unverified entities blocked
FX rate locking — automated FX conversion must handle rate expiry and re-locking; don't assume locked rates persist
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with comprehensive documentation and SDKs
Multi-entity account structures — ensure correct entity selection for each API call; cross-entity payments require explicit routing
Embedded finance licensing — adding financial features to platforms requires jurisdiction-specific licensing review
Sandbox environment available for testing — always test payment flows in sandbox before production automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global payments and financial infrastructure. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, GDPR, AML, OFAC. OAuth2. Multi-region. Cross-border payment and FX transaction security.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global payments and financial infrastructure. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, GDPR, AML, OFAC. OAuth2. Multi-region. Cross-border compliance.
